title: narcissus gussonei
intro: Narcissus gussonei, also known as the Gussone's daffodil or Naples daffodil, is a species of flowering plant in the Amaryllidaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include having anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits associated with Narcissus gussonei include its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as a natural remedy for skin conditions like eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Narcissus gussonei include infusions and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
